channel.title: Exoscale on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Exoscale on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Using Exoscale Compute as a Dedicated Backup Server
item.description: Back up Exoscale compute servers to Exoscale Object Storage using a dedicated compute instance.

item.title: Back Up an Exoscale Managed MySQL Database
item.description: Back up an Exoscale Managed MySQL database to Exoscale Object Storage using mysqldump and Plakar
